raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check","name":"Before we get specific, what's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Lin set context before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late-night driver","name":"What has been driving the late nights for you these past few weeks?","description":"Surfaces whether the load came from a temporary push or a broader pattern.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"After-launch load","name":"Now that those launches are done, where is your workload actually landing?","description":"Checks whether the pace is easing or simply shifting into other work.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Owning the right things","name":"What work are you keeping on your own plate that could sit with someone else?","description":"Probes delegation boundaries and whether Lin is holding too much central work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision bottlenecks","name":"Where do things still have to come back to you before they can move?","description":"Surfaces hidden dependency points and autonomy bottlenecks in the product org.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"What to drop","name":"What are you choosing not to take on next?","description":"Forces a trade-off conversation about priorities and capacity.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would actually be useful from me over the next two weeks?","description":"Gets concrete about the manager support Lin wants without assuming the answer.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegation next step","name":"What is the next thing you want to hand off more cleanly?","description":"Turns delegation into a specific next move rather than a vague principle.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Energy source","name":"What is still giving you energy in the work right now?","description":"Checks for genuine pull and investment beyond the immediate delivery push.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority trade-off","name":"What feels most worth protecting in the next stretch?","description":"Surfaces what Lin wants to preserve as pressure shifts after the launches.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-two-weeks","name":"Given what we've talked about, what's your priority for the next two weeks?","description":"Closes by landing on a concrete commitment for the next check-in window.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
